class.name: CSVTable
class.brief_description: Table-style query helper for CSV rows.
class.description: CSVTable stores CSV data as an array of dictionaries and provides filtering, projection, renaming, grouping, indexing, and join helpers.

method.name: apply_model
method.description: Returns a table with each row cast by [param model].

method.name: build_index
method.description: Builds an index for [param column]. If [param unique] is [code]true[/code], duplicate keys are recorded by the returned [CSVIndex].

method.name: column_names
method.description: Returns all column names found across rows, preserving first-seen order.

method.name: distinct
method.description: Returns a table containing the first row for each unique key. When [param columns] is empty, the entire row is used as the key.

method.name: drop_columns
method.description: Returns a table with [param columns] removed from every row.

method.name: filter_rows
method.description: Returns rows for which [param predicate] returns a truthy value. The callable receives the row and row index.

method.name: from_csv
method.description: Creates a table from a [CSV] resource's rows.

method.name: from_file
method.description: Loads a header-based CSV file into a table using [method CSVImporter.import_with_headers].

method.name: from_file_with_dialect
method.description: Creates a table by importing [param path] using [param dialect].

method.name: from_rows
method.description: Creates a table from dictionary rows. Array rows are converted to dictionaries using numeric keys.

method.name: get_rows
method.description: Returns a copy of the table rows.

method.name: group_by
method.description: Groups rows by [param column], returning a dictionary of key to row arrays.

method.name: inner_join
method.description: Returns rows formed by joining this table to [param other] where the join columns match.

method.name: left_join
method.description: Returns all rows from this table, joined to matching rows from [param other] when present.

method.name: limit
method.description: Returns up to [param count] rows, skipping the first [param offset] rows.

method.name: map_rows
method.description: Returns a table containing dictionaries returned by [param transform]. The callable receives the row and row index.

method.name: rename_columns
method.description: Returns a table with columns renamed according to [param map].

method.name: row_count
method.description: Returns the number of rows.

method.name: select_columns
method.description: Returns a table containing only [param columns].

method.name: set_rows
method.description: Replaces table rows.

method.name: sort_by
method.description: Returns a table stably sorted by [param column].

method.name: sort_by_columns
method.description: Returns a table stably sorted by [param columns] in lexicographic order.

method.name: validate_model
method.description: Validates each row with [param model], returning row-indexed validation reports.

method.name: where_equals
method.description: Returns rows where [param column] equals [param value].

method.name: where_in
method.description: Returns rows where [param column] matches any value in [param values].

method.name: with_column
method.description: Returns a table with [param column] set to a constant value, or to the result of a callable that receives the row and row index.
